title: Jump to Bottom of Updates
excerpt: When you open a bubble of updates, I think it would be useful to have a “Jump to Bottom” button that scrolls you down to the first update (oldest) instead of needing to scroll and load and scroll and load

posts.author: heydontmindme (Rachel Hale)
posts.cookedHtml: When you open a bubble of updates, I think it would be useful to have a “Jump to Bottom” button that scrolls you down to the first update (oldest) instead of needing to scroll and load and scroll and load
